description_long: This is a sleek, futuristic airplane with a sharply pointed nose and angular, swept-back wings featuring blue accents along the leading and trailing edges. The fuselage is streamlined and tapers toward the rear, with a canopy-style cockpit situated near the front and a pair of prominent, upward-canted vertical stabilizers at the tail. The wings are mid-mounted and display a unique, multi-segmented design with additional winglets or control surfaces extending outward and downward. The undercarriage appears to be retracted or not visible, and the engine components are integrated into the main body, suggesting a jet propulsion system. The color scheme is primarily light gray with blue highlights and some black elements, giving the airplane a high-tech, advanced appearance.
description: A futuristic, angular airplane with swept-back blue-accented wings, a pointed nose, and a streamlined gray fuselage featuring a forward canopy cockpit and twin upward-canted tail fins.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, forward canopy, and the wide, angular wings with blue accents extending outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated fuselage, mid-mounted swept wings, and the upward-canted tail fins, with visible engine housing integrated into the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the twin vertical stabilizers, the angular tail structure, and the multi-segmented wings extending outward and downward.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the streamlined body, blue-accented wings, and the integrated engine area.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept, multi-segmented wings featuring upward and downward angled winglets and pronounced anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated into the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with an H-tail configuration, canted outward.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a streamlined canopy.
